title: Majestic Dubai
details: Highlights: Dubai City Tour, Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner, Marina Dhow Cruise, Dubai Frame, Abra Boat Ride, Abu Dhabi City Tour including Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, Ferrari World photo stop, and more.

itinerary.day_details: Arrival in Dubai. Meet and greet the tour guide outside Dubai International Airport. Transfer to hotel in Dubai for check-in and overnight stay.

itinerary.day_title: Day 2: Half-Day Dubai City Tour + Afternoon Desert Safari W/ BBQ (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: Breakfast at the Hotel, Start Tour with Dubai City Tour Visit Jumeirah Area, Photo Stop Burj Al Arab from Jumeirah Beach, Photo Stop Jumeirah Mosque, Drive to Bastakiya, Cross the, cove in Abra Traditional Boats to reach the Spice & Gold Souk, Transfer to Dubai Frame Entrances Included, 3pm Start the Desert Safari (SIC Basis) Including the BBQ Dinner, Overnight at Hotel in Dubai.

itinerary.day_title: Day 3: Full-Day Dubai Sightseeing & Marina Dhow Cruise (B/D)
itinerary.day_details: - Breakfast at the Hotel, Start to Explore Abu Dhabi by visiting Sheik Zayed Grand Mosque, Drive along Abu Dhabi Corniche, Pass By Emirates Palace, Pass by Qasr Al Watan, Photoshop Ferrari World, Shopping at Carpet Shop, After the Tour Drive Back to Dubai, Overnight at hotel in Dubai

itinerary.day_title: Day 4: Full-Day Abu Dhabi City Tour (B/L/D)
itinerary.day_details: - Breakfast at the Hotel, Visit the Modern Part of Dubai, Photoshop Burj Al Arab, Visit Palm Jumeirah, See the Infamous Atlantis the Palm, Transfer to Dubai Mall for Shopping and watch the Dubai Fountain, Marina Dhow Cruise experience with buffet dinner, Overnight at hotel in Dubai.
Breakfast at the Hotel, Check Out, Free time until transfer to Airport, Airport Check In, Departure Back to Manila

inclusions: Meals as indicated in the itinerary
Private bus transportation for tours and transfers
Afternoon Desert Safari Tour with BBQ Dinner (shared jeep)
Marina Dhow Cruise with buffet dinner
2 bottles of water per day during tours
exclusions: Other expenses not mentioned in the inclusions
